sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: RAAL La Louvière have shown mixed results in their last 5 matches, securing 1 win, 3 draws, and 1 loss, with a notable comeback victory against Club Brugge. Sint-Truidense VV, on the other hand, are in strong form with 4 wins and 1 loss in their last 5, including a narrow victory over Standard Liège. This suggests Sint-Truidense hold a clear edge going into the match.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last encounter on August 17, 2025, Sint-Truidense VV edged out RAAL La Louvière with a 2-1 victory at home. This result, combined with Sint-Truidense's higher league standing, indicates their dominance in direct matchups.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV sit 2nd in the league with 42 points and 31 goals scored, showcasing a potent attack. RAAL La Louvière, positioned 13th with 23 points, have struggled offensively with only 18 goals, though their defensive record (23 conceded) is decent. Sint-Truidense's superior possession and chance creation stats further tilt the balance in their favor.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: RAAL La Louvière will miss key defender Wagane Faye, potentially weakening their backline. Sint-Truidense VV have no major absences and boast a strong recent scoring record, especially in the latter stages of matches. The Sofascore prediction model also favors an away win at 49% probability.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Considering Sint-Truidense VV's current form, league position, and head-to-head advantage, they are likely to secure a narrow victory. RAAL La Louvière's resilience at home could make it competitive, but their offensive struggles may hinder them. Expect a closely fought match with Sint-Truidense coming out on top.
